property_address: Flat 123, Sample street, Sample city, AB1 CD3

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: Private balcony of an apartment in a modern high-rise development, accessed via aluminium-framed sliding doors. The balcony is finished with grey composite decking and enclosed by black powder-coated metal balustrade railings. Overall the balcony presents in good, near-new condition with only light surface debris; minor construction-related dust/marks are visible on the decking but no structural defects are apparent.

items.name: Composite decking floor
items.description: Grey/taupe composite (WPC) decking boards laid in linear ribbed pattern with black expansion gaps, running the full width of the balcony.
defects: Scattered light surface debris/small white spots across decking
Light construction dust evident in places

items.name: Balustrade railing
items.description: Black powder-coated metal balustrade with vertical bar infill and flat capping rail, enclosing the balcony perimeter.

items.name: Sliding patio door
items.description: Dark grey/anthracite aluminium-framed full-height sliding glazed door providing access from interior to balcony.

items.name: External wall finish
items.description: Cream/off-white rendered external wall panels forming the side returns of the balcony recess.

items.name: Soffit/ceiling overhang
items.description: Painted underside of the balcony above forming the soffit/ceiling to this balcony, white/grey finish.

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: A modern, high-specification fitted bathroom presented in a clean, well-maintained condition to a high standard. Finishes include large-format white gloss wall tiles, polished black marble-effect floor and feature wall tiles, a fitted bath with glass screen, wall-hung WC, solid-surface wall-mounted basin and a mirrored medicine cabinet. The room is generally in good order with light cosmetic wear noted to the bath side panel sealant, a minor chip to the bath panel trim and faint marking to one wall; otherwise cleaned to a domestic standard throughout.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plastered and emulsioned ceiling in white, incorporating recessed LED downlights and perimeter LED strip lighting, with circular ceiling-mounted extractor/air vent.

items.name: Tiled walls
items.description: Walls finished in large-format white gloss ceramic tiles to bath/shower areas with contrasting polished black marble-effect feature tiling to the basin and WC walls.

items.name: Painted wall (cloakroom/lobby)
items.description: Smooth plastered and emulsioned wall in white/off-white, fitted with two brushed-metal coat/robe hooks.
defects: Faint scuff/pencil-type marking to mid-section of wall (P012)

items.name: Floor tiling
items.description: Polished black/grey marble-effect porcelain floor tiles laid in large format with light grouting.
defects: Surface scratching/scuffing visible to tile near bath, left of bath panel (P016)

items.name: Internal door with handle
items.description: Flush-faced internal door painted white/pale grey, fitted with matt-black lever handle on rose and matching keyed escutcheon, hinged with chrome hinges.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: A well-presented double bedroom in a modern apartment, decorated in neutral magnolia/off-white emulsion with grey carpeting throughout. The room is generally clean and in good decorative order, furnished with a double divan bed, button-upholstered headboard, bedside cabinets, table lamps and a roller blind to the window. A number of minor defects are noted including light scuff/pencil-type marks to walls, a brown spot mark above the headboard, a stain mark to the mattress border, soiling to chrome switch/socket faceplates, and a soiled headboard. An Amazon Basics oil-filled electric radiator is present as supplementary heating. The window overlooks an active construction site.

items.description: Smooth plastered and emulsioned ceiling in white, with recessed downlights and a linear ventilation grille to upper wall/ceiling junction.

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: Entrance hall to a modern, high-specification apartment, finished with emulsioned walls in white and grey/taupe tones, white-painted moulded skirting, oak-effect engineered/laminate flooring and a walnut-veneered solid entrance door with bronze ironmongery. The space includes a built-in storage cupboard with hanging rail and a smart home control panel. Overall decoratively presented to a good standard with isolated light scuffs and marks to walls and a noticeable build-up of dust/debris on the cupboard shelf requiring cleaning.

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: Open-plan reception and kitchen in a modern high-rise apartment, presented to a good furnished standard with high-gloss handleless units, white quartz-effect island/worktop and marble-effect splashback. The space is fitted with premium Miele integrated appliances and finished with engineered oak-effect flooring throughout. Generally clean and in good order, though the grey velvet sofa shows pronounced soiling/water marking and several minor scuffs are noted to walls, woodwork and worktop. The aspect overlooks an active construction site.

rooms.name: Walk In Wardrobe
rooms.summary: A hallway/walk-in wardrobe area presenting in generally good order with recent decoration. Walls are emulsioned in white and a soft grey/blue tone, woodwork is white-gloss, and flooring transitions between grey fitted carpet and oak-effect laminate. Built-in wardrobes finished in grey wood-effect veneer house bedding and clothes hangers. Minor scuff marks noted to one wall and the carpet shows shading/foot-traffic marks but is otherwise clean to domestic standard.
